history.subject: blueprint(01XJ): fix lem:pushforward_isQuasicoherent header — correct \lean pointer to AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.pushforward_isQuasicoherent (was a non-existent constant) and place the [title] as the lemma optional arg so it no longer renders as body; DAG now matches the axiom-clean Lean decl

Stacks 01HQ closed: pullback of tilde is tilde of base change, axiom-clean. Adjoint-uniqueness route: tilde-Gamma adjunction composed with pullback-pushforward vs extend-restrict scalars composed with tilde-Gamma, bridged by the global-sections identification pullbackTilde_gammaBridge; Sigma-pair section identity is unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app. QuotScheme sorries 10 -> 9; blueprint node lem:pullback_tildeIso proof leanok + new nodes lem:tilde_gamma_adjunction_mathlib, lem:pullbackTilde_gammaBridge

baseMap coherence substrate N1-N4 landed axiom-clean: naturality (adjunction-unit), pullbackComp compatibility (unit_conjugateEquiv + conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv), pullbackCongr transport (subst+rfl), and the step3 Sigma-pair upgrade (pullback_of_openImmersion_iso_restrict inverse characterized as the canonical baseMap via unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app for restrictAdjunction vs pullbackPushforwardAdjunction). All six stages of the Beck-Chevalley intertwining at _sectionLinearEquiv now have proved substrate

Beck-Chevalley intertwining CLOSED: pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv proved axiom-clean via the 6-stage chain (step2 Sigma-inverse, N1 naturality + step1 Sigma-identity, N2 pullbackComp twice, N3 pullbackCongr, N4 step3-inversion). The affine-open section formula Gamma(g^*N, U) = Gamma(Y,U) tensor Gamma(N,V) and its IsBaseChange packaging are now sorry-free; QuotScheme sorries 9 -> 8 (remaining: 5 headline + 3 flatness-gated canonicalBaseChangeMap-isIso). Blueprint: N1-N4 nodes leanok with corrected lean-pointers, stage section updated
Blueprint: fix malformed lem:pullback_tildeIso header (Stacks 01HQ node)
